_description: StackShift UI — @stackshift-ui scoped packages for all primitives, layout, and section-level building blocks. Theming via Sanity CMS CSS variables mapped to Tailwind tokens. Next.js Image/Link injected site-wide via StackShiftUIProvider in pages/_app.tsx.

tailwind.colorTokens: primary, secondary, background, primary-foreground, secondary-foreground, rounded-global, font-global

patterns.spacing: Section vertical rhythm: py-20 (hero/featured), py-16 (standard content), py-12 (dense/utility) — always on <Section>, never <Container>. Container: maxWidth={1280} or named xl/2xl. Flex gap prop (numeric): gap={4} tight, gap={6} standard, gap={8} loose. Responsive: <Flex direction='col' className='md:flex-row'>.
patterns.typography: Heading (type=h1-h6, fontSize=xs|sm|base|lg|xl|2xl|3xl|4xl|5xl, weight=thin|extralight|light|normal|medium|semibold|bold|extrabold|black, muted). Text (fontSize=xs-2xl, weight, muted, as). Scale: h1=5xl bold, h2=3xl-4xl semibold, h3=xl-2xl semibold, body=base, secondary=sm muted, caption=xs muted. Font via --font-global CSS var (default: Open Sans) — never hard-code font-family.
conventions: All primitives from @stackshift-ui/* — never use raw HTML when an equivalent component exists
conditionalLink fields (primaryButton, secondaryButton, ctaButton, routes[], links[], navLinks[], footerLinks[]) must use <Button as='link' link={obj} variant='unstyled'> — never raw <a> or <Link>
link prop shape: { label, linkType, internalLink, externalLink, linkTarget } — component reads linkType to choose internal (Next.js Link) vs external (a target)
Button variant: default | destructive | outline | secondary | ghost | link | unstyled. Size: default | sm | lg | icon
Flex justify: normal|start|end|center|between|around|evenly|stretch. align: start|end|baseline|stretch|center. gap is numeric prop not Tailwind class
className always wins via cn() (clsx + tailwind-merge) — reach for built-in props first, className for overrides

Color tokens only: bg-primary (#0045d8), bg-secondary (#3576ff), bg-background (#F9FAFB / dark #1F2937), text-primary-foreground (#FFF), text-secondary-foreground (#FFF), rounded-global (0.25rem). No raw hex in JSX
No dark: Tailwind prefix in variant files — CMS theme system handles mode switching globally
StackShiftUIProvider in pages/_app.tsx replaces Image with Next.js <Image> and Link with Next.js <Link> site-wide — do not re-implement in variant files
@stackshift-ui/system is for StackShiftUIProvider setup only — never import it in variant files
Card sub-components: Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter — all accept className
dialog and sheet trap focus automatically via Radix — no custom focus traps needed
Section needs aria-labelledby pointing to first heading id, or aria-label when no visible heading
